text:
Created attachment 215926
patch for multimedia/openshot

Added preset profile.
Emoji is now available.
Patched the UI for hardware encoding settings. However, it doesn't matter if graphics/mesa-dri option VAAPI and/or VDPAU is not enabled. It shouldn't be used as it causes a kernel panic in my environment :)
Other fixes.
